company_type: Integrated Retail Electricity and Power Generation

supply_chain.dependencies: Nuclear fuel requirements through 2029 contracted with diverse global suppliers; coal purchased from multiple suppliers under various contracts; natural gas purchased through spot market and near-term contracts; reliance on rail, barge, and pipeline infrastructure for fuel delivery; potential impacts from Russia-Ukraine conflict on nuclear fuel supply
risks: Supply chain constraints and labor shortages reducing equipment availability and increasing lead times for materials; inflationary environment driving elevated costs; Russia-Ukraine conflict potentially impacting nuclear fuel supply (Russian uranium import restrictions under PRUI Act); concentration risk in nuclear fuel supply; fuel delivery infrastructure disruptions; extreme weather events affecting fuel availability and costs

Concentration risk in lignite mining operations in Texas; nuclear fuel supply dependencies; coal supply chain disruptions; natural gas price volatility; environmental regulations impacting coal and natural gas operations

regulatory_risks: Moss Landing battery fire regulatory investigations by CPUC, EPA, and other authorities
Illinois coal ash disposal and storage legislation
Corporate Alternative Minimum Tax (CAMT) on book income of certain large corporations
NERC mandatory reliability standards and cybersecurity requirements
Renewable portfolio standards and clean energy mandates
Illinois coal ash disposal and storage legislation requiring closure alternative analysis
Winter Storm Uri regulatory investigations by ERCOT, ERCOT Independent Market Monitor, and Texas Attorney General
Regional Haze Program and BART requirements for visibility
Price-Anderson Act nuclear liability coverage requirements
Cross-State Air Pollution Rule (CSAPR) and Good Neighbor Plan (GNP) Federal Implementation Plan (FIP) for ozone emissions
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) tax credits and corporate alternative minimum tax (CAMT)
Coal Combustion Residuals (CCR) rule and Legacy CCR rulemaking
Trade restrictions including tariffs on imported products and materials
State public utility commission regulations on retail electric providers (REP certification)
Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC) licensing and safety requirements
Section 163(j) limitations on business interest expense deductions
PUCT (Public Utility Commission of Texas) creditworthiness requirements for retail electric providers
Unleashing American Energy Executive Order requiring EPA review of GHG, CSAPR, Legacy CCR and ELG rules
Effluent Limitation Guidelines (ELGs) for steam electricity generation wastewater streams
Potential re-regulation of competitive electricity markets
FERC (Federal Energy Regulatory Commission) market manipulation investigations and compliance
Effluent Limitation Guidelines (ELGs) for wastewater streams
FERC wholesale market regulations
NRC (Nuclear Regulatory Commission) oversight of nuclear power plants including decommissioning requirements
Texas energy market reforms (Dispatchable Reliability Reserve Service)
Changes to market structure and design in ERCOT, PJM, ISO-NE, MISO, NYISO, CAISO
Federal and state subsidies for renewable generation and competing technologies
New or increased taxes or fees on operations
ISO/RTO creditworthiness rules requiring collateral support
Coal Combustion Residuals (CCR) Rule revisions and Legacy CCR Rulemaking expanding groundwater monitoring and closure requirements
State-level climate change regulations (RGGI, California cap-and-trade)
Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) nuclear production tax credits (PTCs) and investment tax credits (ITCs) compliance
EPA regulations on greenhouse gas emissions (GHG rule requiring carbon capture and sequestration/storage)
Telephone Consumer Protection Act compliance for retail marketing
Cross-State Air Pollution Rule (CSAPR) and Good Neighbor Plan for ozone NAAQS
SO2 nonattainment designations for areas surrounding Martin Lake generation plant in Texas
MSHA mine safety regulations
Data privacy and data protection laws affecting retail customer data
Regional Haze BART (Best Available Retrofit Technology) requirements for SO2 emissions in Texas
Price Anderson Act liability limits for nuclear accidents
EPA Particulate Matter (PM2.5) rule lowering annual standard from 12.0 to 9.0 µg/m3
Prohibiting Russian Uranium Imports Act (PRUI Act) affecting nuclear fuel supply
Environmental justice and community concerns affecting project siting and permitting
EPA Greenhouse Gas Emissions (GHG) rule requiring carbon capture and sequestration/storage (CCS) at coal-fired units by 2032

sanction_risks: Russia sanctions impacting nuclear fuel supply and enrichment services
Prohibiting Russian Uranium Imports Act creating supply chain disruption risk through 2027
Potential additional U.S. sanctions against Russia affecting energy deliveries
Russian Federation suspension of uranium shipments to U.S. (November 2024)
